# function: cidr_filter_version

Returns only the CIDRs from `cidrs` that belong to the given IP `version` (4 or 6).



## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
cidr_filter_version(cidrs list of string, version number) list of string
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `cidrs` (List of String) The list of CIDRs to filter.
1. `version` (Number) The IP version to keep: 4 or 6.
